prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your moving relocation forward
items: Research and contact 3 utility companies to schedule disconnection at your old address and connection at your new home
Create a backup plan for your moving day by identifying alternative solutions for potential problems
Resolve address change conflicts by contacting banks and credit card companies about overlapping service addresses
Research and secure temporary storage solutions for items that cannot immediately fit in your new home
Create a detailed timeline to coordinate overlapping lease periods and avoid paying double rent
